jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Resonance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Resonance. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!
